feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Integration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP PI NW7.5 upgrade and split (ctc wizards for PI split)
entry.content:
Hi,

We performed upgrade of SAP dual stack PI NW 7.40 to SAP PI NW 7.5 followed by Split procedure.

We followed upgrade guide, see attached, page 62, 

f the former SAP PI system is a dual-stack implementa­tion, you must carry out after the upgrade of SAP PI to SAP NetWeaver 7.5 the dual-stack-split using the soft­ware provisioning manager for the dual stack-split pro­cedure and the PI Upgrade CTC Wizard for the configu­ration adjustment.

1 - upgrade

2 - split

3 - trying to run PI Upgrade EHP Wizard and it failing.

SAP note DIGITS , see attached, have different sequence: Upgrade, Wizard, Split.

So, 2 documents have different information.

Since Upgrade and split is already done, we are seeking your help on completing PI Upgrade EHP Wizard.

According to the note below, the Wizard cannot be run after split.

Kind regards,

PERSON_NAME.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: REST vs. OData in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi,

We are struggling to integrate a standard OData API (Condition Record for Pricing in Sales - API_SLSPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV) residing on an S/4HANA private cloud system. Both an OData and REST adapter are being used, but both throw an error.

I loaded the EDMX into an Integration Suite tenant to get an XSD out of it. That one is being used in the mapping.

OData

  • End point should be fine: http://<host>:<port>/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SLSPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV
  • Operation = CREATE
  • Resource path = A_SlsPrcgConditionRecord
  • Batch processing enabled
  • Additional parameter ContentTypeEncoding set to none

When testing, nothing can be observed on the S/4HANA side. This is the error in the SAP PO monitoring: The payload is not an entity object.

REST

  • XSRF token usage enabled
  • End point (so batch processing enabled I assume): http://<host>:<port>/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SLSPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV/$batch
  • Content Type set in the HTTP header: Content-Type = application/json

Message delivered to S/4HANA, but I see an HTTP 415 in the SAP PO Monitoring. On the S/4HANA side: this is the error in the response:  The server is refusing to process the request because the entity has an unsupported format.

Pointers and insights are welcome!

Many thanks.
Dimitri

entry.title: SAP CPI Message Mapping - Context issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement where i need to check if else condition of child nodes from first occurance of parent node. Below is my source structure:

<IDOC>
<E1KNA1M>  (0 to 1)
<E1KNVVM> (0 to unbounded)
<E1KNVPM> (0 to unbounded)
<PARVW>AG</PARVW> (0 to 1)
<KUNN2>111</KUNN2> (0 to 1) 
</E1KNVPM>
<E1KNVPM>
<PARVW>ZN</PARVW>
<KUNN2>222</KUNN2>
</E1KNVPM>
</E1KNVVM>
<E1KNVVM>
<E1KNVPM>
<PARVW>WE</PARVW>
<KUNN2>333</KUNN2>
</E1KNVPM>
<E1KNVPM>
<PARVW>ZN</PARVW>
<KUNN2>444</KUNN2>
</E1KNVPM>
</E1KNVVM>
</E1KNA1M>
</IDOC>

Here i need populate KUNN2 to target if PARVW is equal to ZN only from first occurance of E1KNVVM. i should suppress if there is a PARVW with ZN from any other E1KNVVM occurances. copy Value[0] will not work in this case as PARVW is inside E1KNVVM and has multiple occurances. Could you please help how can we achive this. Thanks in advance.

Thanks,

Sailaja.

entry.title: Migrate Java Mapping from SAP PO to SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: Posted as a blog. Will share the blog link here soon.

entry.title: Databricks jdbc 10220 Driver doesn't support this optional feature
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to connect to Azure Databricks DB using JDBC sender adapter from SAP PO 7.5 single stack.

We have installed the Azure Databricks driver on SAP PO server using the link provided by Azure..

But, still we get the following error while pinging the JDBC sender channel from monitoring page.

Could you please guide if you have such experience while connecting to Azure Databricks DB from SAP PO.. thank you!

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: Message Definition like Service interface in Sproxy in SAP ERP when using Integration Suite
entry.content:
Dear Experts

We currently have SAP PI system and we have integrated it with SAP ERP and CRM.

We use lot of ABAP proxies to connect SAP systems with SAP PI.

Now we are replacing SAP PI with cloud-based Integration Suite.

Need help in couple of questions:

1. New interface: There is XI adapter in Integration Suite but how does one create message definition like Service Interface, Message type, etc definition in SAP systems like ERP and CRM as there is no ESR in Intergration Suite?

2. Existing interfaces: how does one use existing ABAP proxy interfaces or transform them as we will not have ESR and SLD of SAP PI after switch to IS.

Thanks in advance.

Sunit

entry.title: AIF monitoring in SAP Backend
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

This is regarding the inbound messages received from partner systems.. pls see below message flow.. 

Partners system --> SAP PO --> SAP Backend(ECC/S4HANA) 

SAP PO message status shows successful but still SAP backend guys say that message has not arrived in AIF monitoring (not visible on AIF monitoring).. Mostly we are using Proxy/IDOC interfaces.. Can you please suggest where all should we monitor on SAP backend (like sxmb_moni, etc..,) ? pls mention all the tcodes separately for both IDOC/Proxy messages so that we could troubleshoot further? 

Could you please let me know what all should be monitored on SAP Backend until it shows up in AIF?

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: URGENT : Has Anyone Integrated SAP SuccessFactors with KeyCloak for SSO?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently leading a project to integrate SAP SuccessFactors with KeyCloak for Single Sign-On (SSO). Our setup involves KeyCloak acting as the Identity Provider (IDP) for frontline users, who are already authenticated into another application via KeyCloak. We now need to extend this authentication mechanism to SuccessFactors.

Current Setup:

  • KeyCloak is fully operational, and we have a realm where users already exists
  • SAP SuccessFactors is already installed and running,

Objective:

We want to allow frontline users to authenticate into SAP SuccessFactors using KeyCloak as the IDP. KeyCloak supports both SAML and OIDC, but we’re leaning toward using SAML for this integration.

Request:

Has anyone in the community attempted or completed a similar integration? If so, could you share:

  • Best practices for configuring SAML-based SSO between KeyCloak and SAP SuccessFactors?
  • Any specific configurations or challenges encountered on the SAP SuccessFactors side?
  • Recommendations for handling user mapping and security considerations in this setup?

Any guidance, documentation, or tips would be greatly appreciated. Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Ashish Sharam

entry.title: SAP PI Mapping help: Duplicate Idoc - continue Sequence
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can you help with the below issue related to PI mapping logic.

Requirement: Source file structure
Target IDoc
in the current design: Target Idoc node is duplicated for a flag field and additional Idocs are generated.
Eg:
I have 3 employee ID's 2247,2799,5832
2247 has 3 records -> 3 Idocs are generated and It has a field flag as Y for two records, so additional 2 idocs are generated
2799 - 1 record -> 1 Idoc is generated with flag as N
5832 - 2 records -> 2 Idocs are generated It has a field flag as Y for one record, so additional 1 idoc is generated

So in total 3 + 2 + 1 + 2 + 1 = 9 Idocs are generated.

In the target Structure, there is a field Record_Seq which has the values as
These Idocs are generated by the 1st Occurance of Idoc node
2247_01
2247_02
2247_03
2799_01
5832_01
5832_02


As I mention earlier, Idoc node is duplicated where Additional Idocs are generated based on Flag Y,  sequence is as below
2247_01
2247_01
5832_01
5832_01

Expected Sequence in the Above Idocs is

2247_04
2247_05
5832_03
5832_04
Basically, I want to continue Idoc sequence in the 2nd Idoc node occurence, please advise how to achieve it

entry.title: How to get data sent from Gmail in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Since SAP Integration Suite can use IMAP and POP3 protocols, how can I use these protocols to receive emails in CPI?
What are the requirements for the sender side? If you have any experience with this, please respond.

entry.title: SAP PO version upgrade and security patch activity
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currenty working on SAP PO 7.5 single stack SP28.. and we would like to upgrade to latest version available.. could you please let us know how do we find out the latest version of SAP PO.. also collecting the right versions for all components.. Also how do we check and conclude whether any security patch is needed for SAP PO environments? Could you please advise on this, Thank you!

Regards

Ramu.

entry.title: AIF monitoring in SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currently using SAP PO/PI 7.5 as Integration platform with in our landscape..

To do AIF(application interface framework) monitoring, to see the end to end message flow from/to S4/ECC regarding outbound/inbound interfaces we have customized Fiori page...

we are using the Fiori page for the following cases..

(i) AIF Messages (ii) AIF Monitoring (iii) Interface monitoring...

In that Fiori page, it shows status of the messages on SAP backend & SAP PO/PI.. also if someone clicks on SAP PO status "hyperlink" of that specific message then it re-directs to the SAP PO monitoring page of that specific message... it is possible to link SAP backend and SAP PO messsage on Fiori page because message ID for outbound messages is same on SAP backend & SAP PO/PI.. it is easier to fetch SAP PO status of the specific message...

Fiori page with SAP PO Message status Hyperlink (here "Success" is hyperlink)..

SAP PO monitoring page of that specific message

We are planning to migrate all the interfaces from SAP PO/PI to SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)..

Now, what are different alternate options available within SAP BTP to cater this requirement..

1. BTP Based Fiori app 

2. SAP Cloud ALM for end to end monitoring..

AFAIK, the option 1) above is expensive since Fiori developers has to put of lot of efforts to build such app for AIF monitoring.. Could option 2) completely replace the above solution implemented in SAP PO/PI?? Could you please let me know which is better option in terms various factors like Cost, efforts, time to develope/implement, SAP recommendation, standard solution etc.., Thank you!

//Ramu

entry.title: How to retrieve an attached PDF file that is encoded in Base64 from a mime multipart format email
entry.content:
How to retrieve an attached PDF file that is encoded in Base64 from a mime multipart format email

Please share any ideas you may have.

I'm considering implementing this in Groovy

Environment is Integration Suite CloudIntegraion IntegrationFlow

Cloud Integration SAP Integration Suite @ash_G

entry.title: Data mismatch in message mapping in SAP PI
entry.content:
Hello experts

So I have an issue here. I have xml data with structure like that includes :

<email_ids>
<id>12@test.com</id>
</email_ids
<email_ids>
<id>34@test.com</id>
</email_ids>

The occurrence of email_ids is (0,unbounded) so it should be able to occur several times without issue. The mapping is straight as source and target structures are the same. I just use map with default so the blank fields can be populated. Now, the issue is while testing the id field is populated ok once, but all the subsequent times, it either has a mismatch or it is not populated at all. Could someone please tell me why this is happening and how to fix this. 

Thank you

entry.title: REST to JDBC with INSERT statement
entry.content:
I am using SAP PI 7.4 I have REST to JDBC receiver with INSERT in action in the mapping ( NOT stored procedure). I need to return any error message when inserting fail or success message in case of success.

I have made REST sender as 'Best Effort'. When insertion fails, I get a fail message in POSTMAN but in case of success, I get an error "No mapping program found".

How to handle the scenario, please suggest.

Thanks

entry.title: How to manually set message tatus in CPI MessageProcessingLog?
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to send back to my requester custom reply if my integration logic works correctly. Requester connecting to Inflow via HTTP adapter, as HTTP is synchronous, when message ends I want to send custom reply for example:
<reply>

<Message> All good</Message>

<StatusCode>200</StatusCode>

</reply>

I found that it's possible to do only when message ends with COMPLETED status.

If I have exception subprocess where I also adjusting response as example :

<reply>

<Message> Error</Message>

<StatusCode>404</StatusCode>

</reply>

, it should end with End Message. Otherwise using End Error it will send Default Error message to requester (as synchronous HTTP response).

Logic works but in that case all messages neither they are failed or completed are COMPLETED in message monitoring and that makes support monitoring very hard.

entry.title: SFTP Error: promptPassword(String message) is not implemented yet!" after SP28 installed
entry.content:
Hi,

We had recently updgraded SAP PO system to SP28. For one of the SFTP receiver channel, I am receving the following error:

"Message could not be forwarded to the JCA adapter. Reason: java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException: promptPassword(String message) is not implemented yet!" 

I had already verified the SAP Note: 3406752 and applied the following Additional parameter in the SFTP Receiver Channel -> Advanced mode

customPreferredAuthentication  = "password"

But still the error remains same.

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you,

Vijay

entry.title: SAP PO - Rest Sender with oAuth2
entry.content:
Hi

I can setup rest Sender in SAP PO with the SAP PO server itself as a Authorization server at the URL - <pohost>/RESTAdapter/OAuthServer/

But is it possible to use an external Authorization server? Means login.microsoftonline.com.... As the token validator?

entry.title: Extra line added to XI output after file is sent from SAP via proxy
entry.content:
We are sending a XML file from SAP to XI via proxy. When the file is opened at XI end they are getting an additional empty line or LF(Line feed) after each item. This file when sent further is not processed due to this empty line.

On checking the payload in SXMB_MONI for the interface there is not empty line item added while sending.

How can we identify why this empty line is getting added for every item.

File opened at XI side: Line 3 and 5 is empty with LF and continues for all the items.

entry.title: SAP PI/PO SFTP to SFTP pass trough scenario UNIX to WINDOWS (LF to CRLF)
entry.content:
Hello Community.

We have a pass trough scenario (there is no conversion) from SFTP UNIX to SFTP WINDOWS.
The expected line sapartor in the target file is CRLF:

 

In File adapter there is a parameter (File Type) where we can set the 'Text' value and it's automatically handled by the adapter to use CRLF.
In SFTP adpter there is no this parameter available.

We have being trying to use different EJB modules (SAP XI Sample/ConvertCRLFfromToLF, MessageTransformBean and TextCodepageConversionBean) with no sucess.

Could you please provide any experience you had with this situation and how it was solved.

I appreciate any comments/help.

 

Thank you!
Fellipe
